overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a futuristic metropolis. The player character moves from a main street sidewalk across an intersection into a narrow, densely-packed alleyway illuminated by vibrant neon signage and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with traffic barriers

events.description: passing from covered walkway into open street view with approaching intersection

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past digital billboards and street furniture

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white pants walking toward camera while looking at phone

entered.detail: outdoor cafe seating with large yellow umbrella and red chairs
bright red automated vending kiosk with illuminated display
tall palm tree trunk with textured bark
tall cylindrical digital display showing pink and green holographic advertisements
bright orange metal barriers separating sidewalk from street traffic
tall futuristic glass building with illuminated windows rising in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered city sidewalk at night, featuring a yellow umbrella cafe on the right and a red vending machine on the left. The camera moves forward past digital billboards and orange traffic barriers, with a massive glass skyscraper visible ahead. Sparse pedestrians walk in the opposite direction as the scene transitions from covered to open street view.

events.description: stepping onto yellow-striped crosswalk to cross the street
silver car passes by on the left while crossing the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection alongside other pedestrians while vehicles pass on the left

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: modern building with distinctive blue and gray paneled exterior
broad pedestrian crossing marked with thick yellow stripes and green 'WALK' text
tall traffic signal pole with green walk indicator illuminated
large building facade bathed in intense red neon lighting
small green and white enclosed kiosk or utility structure on the plaza

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban intersection as the camera crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk. A blue building dominates the right side while a red-lit building glows in the distance. Vehicles pass on the left as the camera moves with the flow of pedestrians toward a plaza area with a green kiosk structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow neon-lit alley entrance with El Coyote bar

events.description: entering narrow alleyway from open plaza, enclosed by tall buildings
lighting shifts to intense red and purple neon as passing El Coyote sign

agents.ego_description: walking into the narrow alley entrance, passing pedestrians gathered near storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket standing near wall looking at phone

entered.detail: bright purple neon sign reading 'El Coyote' above a bar entrance
cyan neon sign reading 'softsys' on building facade
cluster of red spherical lanterns hanging across the alley overhead
scattered trash and debris on the tiled alley floor

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow alleyway from the plaza, transitioning from open space to an enclosed corridor. The environment becomes dominated by intense red and purple neon lighting from the 'El Coyote' sign and overhead lanterns. The ground shows scattered litter as pedestrians browse near storefronts, and the 'softsys' sign becomes visible further down the alley.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial alley with multiple neon storefronts and steam vents

events.description: steam vents release fog into the alley, partially obscuring the view ahead

agents.ego_description: navigating through the crowded narrow alley, passing groups of pedestrians near neon-lit storefronts

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians standing and conversing near a doorway

entered.detail: tall vertical pink neon light strips running down building facade
ground-level vents releasing white steam fog across the alley floor
metal pedestrian bridge connecting buildings overhead with railings
bright cyan neon tube lighting along storefront awning

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves deeper into the narrow neon alley, now densely populated with pedestrians. Vertical pink neon lights illuminate the right side while cyan horizontal neon glows on the left. Steam vents create atmospheric fog at ground level, and an overhead walkway bridge spans the alley ahead. The crowd density increases significantly as the camera navigates through groups of people browsing the various storefronts.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide, open city street into the claustrophobic, neon-drenched depths of a futuristic alleyway. It begins on a covered sidewalk past a yellow umbrella cafe and red vending machine, moving forward through orange traffic barriers toward a towering glass skyscraper. As the camera emerges from the cover, the scene opens into a wide urban intersection where the view expands across yellow-striped crosswalks and glowing blue and red buildings before passing a green kiosk in a plaza. The environment then shifts abruptly from open space to an enclosed corridor as the camera enters a narrow alley dominated by intense red and purple neon signage and scattered litter. Finally, the path narrows further into a densely populated corridor of pink and cyan lights, where ground-level steam vents create an atmospheric fog beneath an overhead walkway bridge.
